description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly matte black finish. The body is robust and squared, with two large rectangular modules on either side, possibly for advanced electronics or cooling systems. The wings or side extensions are flat and wide, giving the rifle a unique silhouette reminiscent of a sci-fi weapon. The barrel is short and integrated into the front, with multiple protruding rods or prongs, suggesting a specialized muzzle device or multi-barrel configuration. The rear section is elongated and streamlined, with a compact, fixed stock. Minimal surface detailing and a lack of visible traditional controls or magazine indicate a high-tech or conceptual firearm.
description: A futuristic, matte black rifle with wide side extensions, a compact stock, and a multi-pronged barrel. Its angular, robust design suggests advanced technology.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat side extensions and the multi-pronged barrel, emphasizing the rifle's angular, symmetrical design.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated body, compact stock, and the protruding rods at the front, with the rectangular modules clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the streamlined back and the symmetry of the side extensions, with the stock and rear body shape prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same elongated body, compact stock, and front prongs, with clear visibility of the side modules.
